title: UPTET 2026 Online Form
post_name: Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPTET 2026 Apply Online Form | Syllabus Download
organization_full_name: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC)
fee_payment_method: Pay the Examination Fee Through SBI I Collect Fee Mode Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Pay the Exam Through SBI E Challan Fee Mode, Submit Fee Any Branches of SBI
qualification: Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with 50% Marks with B.Ed / B.Ed Special Exam Passed / Appearing (Final Year) OR; Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with BTC Training 2 Year Exam Passed OR; 10+2 Intermediate Exam with 50% Marks and B.LEd 4 Year Course OR; 10+2 Inter Exam with 50% Marks and B.SC Ed Exam Passed; Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 45% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) (As per NCTE Norms) OR; More Details Read Notification.
qualification_items: Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with 50% Marks with B.Ed / B.Ed Special Exam Passed / Appearing (Final Year) OR
Bachelor Degree / Master Degree with BTC Training 2 Year Exam Passed OR
10+2 Intermediate Exam with 50% Marks and B.LEd 4 Year Course OR
10+2 Inter Exam with 50% Marks and B.SC Ed Exam Passed
Bachelor Degree in Any Stream with 45% Marks / Master Degree in Any Subject with B.Ed Degree (Passed / Appearing) (As per NCTE Norms) OR
how_to_apply: Uttar Pradesh Education Service Selection Commission (UPESSC), Prayagraj Are Released Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test UPTET Examination 2026. Candidate Can Apply Between 27/03/2026 to 26/04/2026.
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in UPTET Primary and Junior Level 2026.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
For the latest updates on Sarkari Result, admit card, answer key, and result, always visit SarkariResult.com, the official website for Sarkari Result in India (Since 2012).
